race.description: Magic Millions National Sale Mdn Hcp
race.comment: Tricky contest. LIFE IS A SHIRAZ (2) three-year-old gelding by Fierce Impact from Star Syrah on debut for the Bjorn Baker yard. Has impressed in his last three trials and can make a winning debut in this company. ARTISTIC LADY (7) much better effort when she worked home strongly to secure third over 1100m at Goulburn. Leading apprentice rides and looks close to getting off the mark. HO ALOHA (5) sat on the speed in a muddling run race with a plugging third over 1100m at Goulburn. Gets map favours today and sure to be thereabouts. POWER HUNGRY (9) returns from a let-up and the claim helps in this easier contest. Each way.
